options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -add
options.description: List of hosts to be added to the host list for rsh/ssh distribured processing

options.name: -args
options.description: Additional arguments to specify along with submit command for LSF/SGE (-P -W etc)

options.name: -custom
options.description: Use custom job submission script for distributed processing

options.name: -custom_script
options.description: Custom job submission script and arguments for "custom" distributed processing mode

options.name: -custom_script_list
options.description: Custom job submission script list and arguments for "custom" distributed processing mode(example: {{{stringCommand1} count1} {{stringCommand2} count2} ... {{stringCommandN} countN}})

options.name: -custom_script_local
options.description: Custom job submission script and arguments for "local" distributed processing mode

options.name: -env_script
options.description: Custom environment script for slaves start up

options.name: -local
options.description: Run distributed processing job on the local machine

options.name: -local_as_remote
options.description: Use local host as remote when there is gpu queue

options.name: -lsf
options.description: Use LSF for distributed processing

options.name: -nc
options.description: Use nc commands (Network Computer from RTDA) for distributed processing

options.name: -noWaitTaskComeUp
options.description: Do not wait forever if a task does not come up

options.name: -queue
options.description: Queue name for LSF or SGE (Sun Grid Engine)

options.name: -remove
options.description: List of hosts to be removed from the host list for rsh/ssh distributed processing

options.name: -reportLsfInfo
options.description: Collect the lsf slave info after edp finish

options.name: -resource
options.description: Resource string for LSF (-R) or SGE (Sun Grid Engine)

options.name: -shellTimeout
options.description: Timeout value to check rsh/ssh machine response time (default = 5 seconds)

options.name: -single_cpu_lsf_args
options.description: Same as " -args", for single cpu distributed application specially

options.name: -ssh
options.description: Use ssh for distributed processing

options.name: -timeOut
options.description: Timeout period for jobs which never start Default: (3600 seconds)
